normalized_value.title: Dataset Open Question
normalized_value.rewritten_question_text: An astable multivibrator circuit using IC 555 timer is shown below. Assume that the circuit is oscillating steadily. Between what two voltages does the capacitor voltage \(V_C\) vary?

agent_assessment.rationale: The question text is complete and the circuit image is legible enough to identify a 555 astable multivibrator with 9 V supply and the capacitor node VC. A reviewer can understand that the expected answer is the capacitor swing between the 555 trigger/threshold levels, i.e. 1/3 VCC to 2/3 VCC.
